mnemonics.title: Bidirectional RNN
mnemonics.content: Two RNNs, one forward and one backward

acronyms.usage: A type of RNN that can capture information from both the past and the future

visualTips.visualization: Two RNNs, one processing the input sequence in the forward direction and the other in the backward direction

analogies.analogy: Reading a sentence from left to right and then from right to left to understand the context
